reviews.review_title: It now it can is some work
reviews.review_description: I like it.it need more ceriders in my opinion. I love that it doesn't have microtransachis. It good.

Mecha Party is a fun and engaging game that's easy to pick up and enjoy, even for newcomers. Its colorful visuals and intuitive gameplay make it accessible to a wide range of players. Matches are action-packed and offer plenty of excitement.

However, there are a few drawbacks. One downside is the requirement to return to your home base every time you want to start a new match—it feels a bit cumbersome. Additionally, the inability to select maps limits player choice, which can be frustrating for those who enjoy variety. Another issue is that friend invites don't seem to function properly, making it harder to team up with friends and fully enjoy the multiplayer experience.

Overall, Mecha Party is a great game that delivers on fun and accessibility, despite a few areas that could use improvement. If you're looking for a game that's simple to learn and provides solid entertainment, this one is worth checking out.

developer_response.body: We are very honored that you like this game. Thanks about your feedback. We will continue to work hard to make it better.
